subject: Fixes for portal App Access tests
commit_message:
Fixes for portal App Access tests

Issue-ID: PORTAL-782
Change-Id: I573f18e653bc008c4454775d80120fc891290fde
Signed-off-by: Brian Freeman <bf1936@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 2:

still working on the /etc/host piece

Patch Set 2:

turns out it works from robot with any of the private 10.0 address like 10.0.0.14 (k8s-01)

Patch Set 3:

root@release-nfs:~/oom/kubernetes/robot# ./ete-k8s.sh onap portal-ci
++ export NAMESPACE=onap
++ NAMESPACE=onap
+++ kubectl --namespace onap get pods
+++ sed 's/ .*//'
+++ grep robot
++ POD=dev-robot-robot-6f64bf9969-hrrb6
++ TAGS='-i portal-ci'
+++ dirname ./ete-k8s.sh
++ DIR=.
++ SCRIPTDIR=scripts/etescript
++ ETEHOME=/var/opt/ONAP
++ [[ portal-ci == \e\x\e\c\s\c\r\i\p\t ]]
+++ kubectl --namespace onap exec dev-robot-robot-6f64bf9969-hrrb6 -- bash -c 'ls -1q /share/logs/ | wc -l'
++ export GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER=35
++ GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER=35
+++ printf %04d 35
++ OUTPUT_FOLDER=0035_ete_portal-ci
++ DISPLAY_NUM=125
++ VARIABLEFILES='-V /share/config/robot_properties.py'
++ VARIABLES='-v GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER:20433'
++ kubectl --namespace onap exec dev-robot-robot-6f64bf9969-hrrb6 -- /var/opt/ONAP/runTags.sh -V /share/config/robot_properties.py -v GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER:20433 -d /share/logs/0035_ete_portal-ci -i portal-ci --display 125

still requires /etc/hosts changes - working on helm chart in parallel

looks good other than the etc/hosts change

Patch Set 3:
